meta.title: Harbour.Space — Status
meta.description: Real-time service status for harbour.space and related products.

overall.performance_issues: Some services are seeing performance issues

monitoring.neverReported: Monitoring agents have not started reporting yet. Component statuses below are placeholders until the first heartbeat arrives.
monitoring.stale: Monitoring is offline — last agent heartbeat {{relative}}. Component statuses are not being updated until contact is restored.

subscribe.title: Subscribe to status updates
subscribe.intro: Get an email when harbour.space services have an incident. Confirm your address to start receiving updates; you can unsubscribe in one click.
subscribe.checkEmailBody: We sent a confirmation link to {{email}}. Click it to start receiving incident updates.
subscribe.alreadyBody: {{email}} is already confirmed for these updates. Check the unsubscribe link in any of our emails to stop receiving them.
subscribe.confirmedBody: You'll get an email when an incident opens or updates. Thanks for following along.
subscribe.confirmFailedTitle: Confirmation link is no longer valid
subscribe.confirmFailedBody: The confirmation token is missing, expired, or already used. Subscribe again to receive a fresh link.

error.invalid-email: Please enter a valid email address.
error.invalid-component: That component does not exist. Pick one from the list.
error.captcha: Captcha verification failed. Please try again.

unsubscribe.confirmBody: We'll stop sending you incident emails. You can resubscribe at any time.
unsubscribe.doneBody: You won't receive any more incident emails. We're sorry to see you go.
unsubscribe.failedTitle: Unsubscribe link is no longer valid
unsubscribe.failedBody: The token is missing or already used. If you're still receiving emails, contact support.
unsubscribe.missingBody: This unsubscribe link is incomplete. Use the link in the most recent email you received.
